# Okiro — Photo Journal App

> Okiro is a minimalist photo journal app for capturing one photo and one thought a day, building a beautiful daily diary of the moments that matter. Free for 7 days, then 28 NOK/month.

## What Okiro is

Okiro is a daily **photo journaling** web app, installable as a Progressive Web App (PWA) on iOS and Android. Each day, users capture **one photo** and pair it with a **short reflection**. Over time, the entries form a scrollable timeline — a private, visual diary of everyday life.

It is designed for people who want the emotional value of journaling without the friction. One photo. One thought. Every day.

**Primary keywords:** photo journal app, one photo a day app, daily photo diary, visual journaling, daily reflection app, photo memory app, mindful photography.

**Operator:** Nordli Media, Carl Berners Plass 2, Oslo, Norway.
**Domain:** https://okiro.online
**Contact:** hello@okiro.online

## Core features

- **One photo a day** — A single capture each day removes pressure and forces presence.
- **One thought** — Pair the photo with a short written reflection (a word, a sentence, a feeling).
- **Timeline feed** — All entries form a scrollable photo diary you can revisit anytime.
- **Streaks** — Daily streak counter to encourage consistency.
- **Relive** — Shuffles past memories to resurface forgotten days.
- **Daily push reminders** — Optional gentle nudges so you do not miss a day.
- **PWA install** — Add to home screen on iPhone (Safari) or Android (Chrome). No app store needed.
- **End-to-end privacy** — Photos are encrypted client-side (AES-256-GCM) before upload. Even infrastructure providers cannot view them.
- **No ads, no tracking, no AI training** on your content.

## Pricing

- **7 days free trial** — No credit card required to start.
- **28 NOK per month** after the trial. Tax included. Cancel anytime.
- Billed via Stripe. EEA statutory withdrawal rights apply.

## Authentication

Users can sign up or sign in with:
- Email + password
- Google OAuth
- Apple OAuth

A 7-day trial begins automatically on account creation. Subscription is required to continue after the trial.

## Public pages

- [Landing / Welcome](/welcome): Marketing page — features, install guide, pricing, and call-to-action to start the free trial.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Create an account or sign in with Google, Apple, or email.
- [Subscribe](/subscribe): Subscription details and Stripe checkout after the free trial ends.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): GDPR-aligned policy. Covers data collection, client-side encryption, retention, user rights.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Eligibility, acceptable use, billing, refunds, governing law (Norway).
- [Cookie & Storage Policy](/cookies): Minimal cookie use — strictly-necessary auth session, cache, and Stripe checkout cookies only.
- [Unsubscribe](/unsubscribe): Token-based one-click email unsubscribe.

## Privacy & security highlights

- Photos encrypted on the device before upload (AES-256-GCM).
- Hosted in the EU (Lovable Cloud / Supabase).
- Stripe handles all payment data — Okiro never sees card details.
- GDPR Art. 6(1)(b), (f), (a) legal bases. Full user rights: access, correction, deletion, export, restriction, withdrawal of consent.
- Account deletion removes all data within 30 days.
- No analytics scripts, no advertising cookies, no cross-site tracking.

## Technology

- Web-based PWA built with React, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS.
- Backend: Lovable Cloud (Supabase) — Postgres, storage, auth, edge functions.
- Payments: Stripe Checkout & Billing.
- Push notifications: Web Push (VAPID), supported on iOS 16.4+, Android, desktop browsers.

## Frequently asked questions

**Is Okiro free?** Yes, for 7 days. After that it is 28 NOK/month.
**Do I need to install anything?** No, Okiro runs in the browser. You can optionally install it to your home screen as a PWA.
**Can I export my data?** Yes. Email hello@okiro.online or use the in-app account controls.
**Can other people see my photos?** No. Journals are private to each user, and photos are encrypted client-side.
**What if I miss a day?** Your streak resets, but the timeline keeps going. There is no penalty.
**Does Okiro use my photos to train AI?** No. Never.
